programme.desc: Titoo, a kind-hearted eight-year-old boy, and his friends celebrate the festival of Janmashtami. S12E25.

programme.desc: When Titoo plays an archery game in the fair, Shera tries to distract him. S12E26.

programme.title: Lord Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean visits Scotland and comes across a man who looks identical to him. S02E18.

programme.title: Car Wars-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean goes to the garage to fix his Mini after the Reliant Supervan crashes it. S02E19.

programme.title: Wedding Day-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean has to get the bride to the church, but Irma gets angry seeing them together. S02E20.

programme.title: Bean Phone-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean is appalled to learn about the cost of a smartphone and decides to build one. S02E21.

programme.title: Hotel Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr. Bean receives unexpected guests who wrongly believe he runs a hotel. S02E22.

programme.title: Jurassic Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean travels to the countryside to photograph nature and runs into misadventures. S02E23.
